page: Microsoft Azure DC4ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCADSv5 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, a 154 GB local disk is bundled with the instance. Additionally, the hardware configuration supports Premium Storage options for external disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance as a standard general-purpose option. The inclusion of dedicated vCPUs and local storage provides predictable compute performance and fast scratch space, making it suitable for workloads such as web serving, small databases, and general-purpose application hosting.
description: Microsoft Azure DC4ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance from the DCADSv5 family, powered by an AMD processor on the x86_64 architecture. Managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. The instance includes 154 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance external disk configurations. It does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile offers a balanced allocation of compute and memory resources, making it suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web servers, application hosting, and small-scale database deployments requiring dedicated CPU resources and local scratch space.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC4ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and a 154 GB local disk, optimized for balanced workloads under Microsoft Hyper-V.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD compute cores, sixteen gigabytes of memory, and integrated local disk storage.

16.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
